'''''Riley''''' was an [[Action VI bulk transport/Legends|Action VI transport]]. The ''Riley'' was present in the [[Nezni system/Legends|Nezni system]], going into the hangar of the ''[[Corvalis]]'', where the incident between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and the [[Hurrim]] took place.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
